title: Repo re-pull + CR-3B refinement: event-name alignment to live GTM container, Calendly demo_booked split, pre-deploy fixes
verification_method: headless dataLayer assertion via Playwright (screenshot tool); lead API mocked so no real Freshsales lead created. deployment_agent static check.
work_done: Pulled GitHub Abhi-mygenie/website branch 8-june into wiped /app; recreated backend/.env + frontend/.env; services up; app live on preview.
Shipped CR-3B code batch (see iteration_10): #2 consent, #3 tiered values, #4 segmentation, #5 lead_quality, #6 click-IDs, ConsentBanner.
Aligned event names to live GTM container GTM-K5D84Z3L via GTM_EVENT_NAME map in gtm.js.
Refined per owner: book_demo->thankyou_conversion (Book Demo, fired on demo submit); demo_booked kept as its own NET-NEW Calendly event.
Pre-deploy fixes: unblocked .env in .gitignore; added missing REACT_APP_GTM_ID=GTM-K5D84Z3L to frontend/.env.

event_name_mapping_verified.OTP verified: lead_verifided (value 500, typo preserved) -> FB/GA4 OTP Verified + GAds Book Demo
event_name_mapping_verified.calendly booking: demo_booked (value 2000) -> owner's new calendly Trigger + GA4 - Book Appointment tag

bug_found_and_fixed: ConsentBanner used react-router <Link> outside <BrowserRouter> -> 'Cannot destructure basename' crash. Switched to <a href=/privacy>.

blockers_fixed: frontend/.env added REACT_APP_GTM_ID=GTM-K5D84Z3L (was missing; GTM is host-gated to www.mygenie.online so prod tags would not fire without it)
deployment_readiness.non_blocking_noted: admin list endpoints use .to_list(1000/5000) caps; pre-existing low-volume patterns, not deploy blockers.

owner_gtm_status.google_ads_book_appointments_is_import_f: no tag/label; use GA4 demo_booked key event import route

next_actions_owner: Click Deploy (Emergent) -> site live on www.mygenie.online (first time GTM loads).
Main agent re-registers Calendly webhook to prod URL.
1 test booking + GTM Preview to confirm all 4 events; check GA4 Realtime for demo_booked.
Select GA4 demo_booked event in Google Ads -> Book appointment conversion -> Primary -> turn off Zapier import.
Unpause OTP-Verified tags; then #1 Enhanced Conversions + Advanced Matching, #3 value mapping, #4 GA4 custom dimensions, #5 junk exclusion audience, #2 consent variables.
cleanup: No persistent test data created (lead API mocked during QA).
